MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition And Vehicle Inspection; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Andrew Jung, of Quill & Arrow, LLP, Tel: (310) 933-4271, appearing for plaintiff;
David Polyakov, of Shook, Hardy & Bacon LLP, Tel: (415) 544-1900, appearing for defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.'s Motion To Compel Deposition And Vehicle Inspection is granted. Counsel are ordered to meet and confer to schedule a vehicle inspection within (6) six weeks, and agree on a date to compel plaintiff's deposition. Defendant shall prepare the proposed order.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Set For Trial On Sep-09-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
